meta.title: PortMix SA — Interior joinery, exceptional interiors
meta.description: Made-to-measure doors, wardrobes and walk-in closets in French-speaking Switzerland. Family business founded in 2017 in Echandens. Showroom, consulting, manufacturing and installation.

hero.subtitle: Made-to-measure doors, wardrobes and walk-in closets. Since 2017, a family business serving Switzerland's finest interiors.

home.introText: PortMix SA designs, manufactures and installs made-to-measure interior fittings: doors of all kinds, wardrobes and walk-in closets. From the first sketch to the final installation, a single team accompanies you — with the precision and reliability you expect from a Swiss company.
home.servicePortesText: Interior, sliding, technical and fire-rated doors — every wood species, every finish, installed to the millimetre.
home.serviceArmoiresText: Made-to-measure wardrobes and built-in closets that use every centimetre and integrate perfectly with your architecture.
home.serviceDressingsText: Exceptional walk-in closets designed around your daily life: noble materials, integrated lighting, intelligent layout.
home.showroomText: Our Echandens showroom presents our doors, wardrobes and walk-in closets at full scale. Compare materials, finishes and mechanisms — and leave with precise ideas for your project.
home.ctaText: Let's talk about it. We advise you with no obligation, at your home or in our showroom.

about.title: A story of family and hard work
about.storyP1: PortMix SA was born in 2017 from a family initiative and a simple conviction: in French-speaking Switzerland, there was room for an interior joinery company combining artisanal standards with impeccable service.
about.storyP2: Through hard work and a strong sense of responsibility, the company has kept growing: new employees, a showroom in Echandens, a branch in Geneva — and above all, the trust of private clients, architects and general contractors across the Lake Geneva region.
about.storyP3: To this day, PortMix remains a family business. Every project is followed personally, from the first meeting to the final installation.
about.value1Text: Noble materials, careful manufacturing, millimetre-precise installation. We only deliver what we would be proud to have in our own homes.
about.value2Text: No imposed catalogue: every door, wardrobe and walk-in closet is designed for your space and your habits.
about.value3Text: A close-knit team, stable contacts and personal commitment on every project.
about.teamText: A team of specialists guiding you from idea to installation.

services.title:
From consulting to installation,
one single team
services.intro: We design, manufacture and install all of your interior fittings. One contact person, one standard of excellence.
services.portesText: Classic or flush interior doors, sliding doors, technical, fire-rated or acoustic doors: we supply and install every type of door, in every wood species and finish. Frames included, adjusted to the millimetre.
services.portesF4: All wood species, lacquers and finishes
services.armoiresText: Wardrobes that hug your walls, slopes and niches. Every centimetre is used, every front designed to blend into your interior — from clean minimalism to warm classic style.
services.dressingsText: The walk-in closet is where made-to-measure shows its full potential. We design it around your wardrobe and your rituals: integrated lighting, soft-close drawers, noble materials and a layout considered down to the smallest detail.
services.step1Text: At your home or in the showroom: we listen, take measurements and advise you with no obligation.
services.step2Text: Precise plans and visuals, choice of materials and finishes, detailed and transparent quote.
services.step3Text: Careful manufacturing to Swiss standards, with quality control at every step.
services.step4Text: Our own installation team works cleanly and on schedule, down to the final adjustment.

realisations.title: The result speaks for us
realisations.intro: A glimpse of our recent projects in Western Switzerland — made-to-measure doors, wardrobes and walk-in closets for private clients, architects and general contractors.
realisations.showroomText: Our Echandens showroom displays doors, wardrobes and walk-in closets in a real setting. Make an appointment — we will show you around personally.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.intro: Call us, write to us or visit the showroom: we respond quickly and advise you with no obligation.
contact.formSuccess: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We will get back to you shortly.
contact.formError: Something went wrong. Please try again or write to us directly at info@portmix.ch.

footer.tagline: Exceptional interiors — made-to-measure doors, wardrobes and walk-in closets in Western Switzerland.
